name: Bialetti Industrie S.p.A
summary: Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. manufacturers and sells coffee pots and makers, and espresso machines in Italy. The company offers coffee capsules, and grounds and grains; monovalent and trivalent espresso machines; and moka, filtered, and special coffee makers, as well as coffee maker accessories. It also provides cookware, including plates and pans, accessories for special cooking, pots and casseroles, and molds; coffee cups and accessories; and small appliances. The company offers its products under the Bialetti, Aeternum, Rondine, and CEM brands. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Coccaglio, Italy. Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Bialetti Holding srl.
